trigger.description: Workspace hygiene observed at least one active exclusive Agent Mail reservation on .beads/issues.jsonl held by the same agent that invoked hygiene. The self-held reservation is filtered out of the BeadsReservedByOtherAgent decision (per bd-1eq3l.4 acceptance) but is reported as informational evidence so callers can confirm their own coordination state.
setup_commands: # Acquire an exclusive Agent Mail reservation on .beads/issues.jsonl for the current agent, then invoke workspace hygiene from the same identity
# (the reservation is the trigger; the agent name must match self_agent_name passed to classify_beads_state)

repair_strings: Release the self-held .beads/issues.jsonl reservation when the editing window for this agent has ended.
No action required if the reservation is intentional; this row is informational evidence.
